prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年东北大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约2442名、2605名、2843名、2464名、2483名，整体呈波动走势。2023年达到峰值2843名后回落，近两 年在2464–2483区间窄幅震荡，2025年基准约2483名；该校在海南省招生计划2021–2024年均为25人，2025年增至26人；2026年招生计划数据暂缺， 按持平处理。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学是985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第38名，属于全国顶尖高校行列，对考生有较强吸引力；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及秦皇岛校区命名争议，无重大负面舆情；2025年曾因实习安全事故被偏负面评价。抖音综合热度排名第82位，评价为一般，短视 频平台曝光度不高，报考关注度无明显升温信号；第五轮学科评估中，控制科学与工程获评A+（全国顶尖），计算机科学与技术获评A，软件工程、机械工程、 材料科学与工程获评A-，冶金工程获评A，共6个A类学科，工科实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类、电气工程及其自 动化等专业社会热度为高热推荐，与该校优势学科高度契合；机械/智能制造类热度分化观望。海南省2026年高考考生总数预计约78000人，较2025年的67408人增长约15.7%，考生 规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年在2464–2483区间窄幅震荡、2026年招生计划数据暂缺按持平处理、2026年 海南省考生总数大幅增长约15.7%导致竞争加剧、学校层次高且优势学科突出对考生有持续吸引力、声誉中性偏负面且抖音热度一般无明显加成等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次 在2025年基准2483名基础上小幅后移（竞争加剧），预测最低位次约2513名，区间2136–2890名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 自动化类（包含自动化、电气工程及其自动化、测控技术与仪器、电子科学与技术、工业智能）
- 计算机类（包含软件工程、信息安全、数字媒体技术）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（包含电子信息工程、通信工程）
- 智能制造工程
- 机械类（包含机械工程、过程装备与控制工程、车辆工程、工业设计）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 经济管理试验班（包含工商管理、市场营销、会计学、工业工程、信息管理与信息系统、金融学、经济学）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约2513名，区间2136–2890名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如2100名以内）可重点冲刺一档的自 动化类或计算机类王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如2800名以外）应以三档经济管理试验班保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Northeastern University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 2442, 2605, 2843, 2464, and 2483, showing a fluctuating trend. After reaching a peak of 2843 in 2023, it declined and has been oscillating narrowly within the 2464–2483 range in the past two years, with a baseline of about 2483 in 2025. The enrollment plan in Hainan Province was 25 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 26 in 2025. Data for the 2026 enrollment plan is temporarily unavailable and is assumed to remain unchanged.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 38th, placing it among the top universities nationwide, which strongly attracts candidates. In 2026, its reputation is assessed as neutral/mixed, mainly involving the naming controversy of the Qinhuangdao campus, with no major negative public opinion. In 2025, it received somewhat negative evaluations due to a safety accident during internships. Its overall Douyin popularity ranks 82nd, rated as average, with low exposure on short video platforms and no significant signs of increased application interest. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Control Science and Engineering was rated A+ (top nationally), Computer Science and Technology was rated A, Software Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering were rated A-, and Metallurgical Engineering was rated A, totaling six A-level disciplines, highlighting strong engineering capabilities that strongly attract applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication Engineering, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended due to high social popularity and strong alignment with the university's advantageous disciplines. Mechanical/Intelligent Manufacturing majors show divided and wait-and-see popularity. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Hainan Province is expected to be about 78,000, an increase of approximately 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025, significantly intensifying overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings in the 2464–2483 range in the past two years, the 2026 enrollment plan data being temporarily unavailable and assumed unchanged, the significant increase of about 15.7% in the number of Hainan Province exam takers in 2026 leading to intensified competition, the high university level and outstanding disciplines providing sustained attraction to candidates, and the neutral-to-negative reputation with average Douyin popularity offering no significant boost, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to shift slightly downward from the 2025 baseline of 2483 (due to intensified competition). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2513, with a range of 2136–2890.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Automation (including Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Electronic Science and Technology, Industrial Intelligence)
- Computer Science (including Software Engineering, Information Security, Digital Media Technology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering
- Mechanical (including Mechanical Engineering, Process Equipment and Control Engineering, Vehicle Engineering, Industrial Design)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (including Business Administration, Marketing, Accounting, Industrial Engineering, Information Management and Information Systems, Finance, Economics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 2513, with a range of 2136–2890. If your ranking falls within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 2100), you can primarily aim for the top-tier Automation or Computer Science majors in Tier 1. If your ranking is close to the upper bound of the range (e.g., beyond 2800), you should mainly rely on the Tier 3 Economics and Management Experimental Class as a safety net.
